cedict_en: to brake (when driving)/to stop/to switch off/to check (bad habits)/a brake
an instant (Sanskrit: ksana); split second; the twinkling of an eye
dialectal equivalent of 什麼|什么[shen2 me5]/also pr. [sha4]
to glisten; to glitter; to twinkle; to flicker/to be evasive; to equivocate
